creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #3)

This commit includes a patch which is plausibly upstreamable.  Using the "current" version probably isn't something we can make work without patching and I'd rather having something that usually works than have to maintain a patch.  Please let me know if this improves the situation.  If so I'll get it pushed upstream and apply the patch where required.
